channel.title: Data Engineering on Sarbhanu B.
channel.description: Recent content in Data Engineering on Sarbhanu B.

item.title: 🧩 Web Application: BBC Reader
item.description:
View on GitHub

BBC Reader

BBC Reader is a web-app that is built around the database which is being created by BBC Scraper. It is storing scraped data to MongoDB multiple times a day. More about the ‘bbc-scraper’ project below.

item.title: 📊 Tableau: Four years of Blue Bikes
item.description:
Four years of Blue Bikes

Blue Bikes (formerly, Hubway) is owned by the municipalities of Boston, Brookline, Cambridge and Somerville, and operated by Motivate International, Inc in Boston, MA.
